title: The Kiss of Defiance - A 20 Questions General Knowledge Podcast Quiz
summary: 🎙️ Episode 132 – The Kiss of Defiance Fairy tales, revolutions, romance, and rebellion — welcome to Episode 132 of 20 Questions Quiz. This week’s journey moves from enchanted slumbers to historic uprisings, from strategic boards to sweeping love stories. Along the way, we cross oceans, follow legends,  revisit classic albums, and uncover moments that quietly changed the world. It’s an episode about turning points — the move that shifts the game, the letter that sparks determination, the story that refuses to be silenced. Expect questions on: 🎭 Literature & Legend 👑 Monarchs & Movements 🎵 Music & Movies 🌍 Geography & Nature 🧪 Science & Discovery ♟️ Games of strategy and chance Play along wherever you are — at home, in the car, or convincing yourself you definitely would have won that medieval uprising. title: The Two Minute Drill General Knowledge Christmas Compilation #1
summary: 🎄 Two Minute Drill – Christmas Compilation Special 🎄 We’ve taken some of our favourite Two Minute Drill episodes from the past and brought them together into a festive compilation — perfect for Christmas listening! This is a fast-paced, family-friendly quiz, ideal for playing together over the holidays. You’ll face 5 quick-fire questions, each with 20 possible answers, and you’ve got just 2 minutes per question to name as many as you can. ⏱️🧠 No pressure… well, maybe a little! 😄  Play along on your own, challenge the family, or use it as a fun Christmas Day game. 🎁 Short, snappy and packed with festive fun  🎅 Suitable for all ages  🎄 Perfect for car journeys, Christmas downtime, or post-dinner quizzes ❓ How many answers can you get before time runs out?
